name: Margin Call - IBKR Campus
snippet: Interactive Brokers does not make margin calls. Instead, real-time liquidations occur when an account has a margin deficiency.

name: Does Interactive Brokers use any particular priority order
snippet: Interactive Brokers generally does not issue margin calls and will liquidate positions in your account without prior notice to meet margin requirements.

name: Liquidate Last | IBKR Glossary | IBKR Campus
snippet: If set to “Yes” this position will be put at the end of the queue to liquidate last in the case of margin requirements.

name: Understanding IB Margin Webinar Notes
snippet: IB will automatically liquidate positions in an account when the account equity falls below the minimum maintenance margin requirement.

name: Margin Warning | IBKR Glossary | IBKR Campus
snippet: Real-time liquidations occur when your account has a margin deficiency. Generally, accounts will not have time to deposit funds to meet a margin deficiency.
